## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`uv run pytest`)
- [ ] Ruff is clean (`uv run ruff check .`)
- [ ] If adding a company: YAML validates (`uv run pipeline seed validate`)
- [ ] If adding an extractor: contract test + fixture committed
- [ ] No LinkedIn/Indeed/Glassdoor scrapers introduced
